faqItems.q: What pets can I use with the AI pet portrait generator?
faqItems.a: Our AI pet portrait generator works with all types of pets including dogs, cats, birds, hamsters, rabbits, fish, reptiles, and more. Simply upload a clear photo of your pet and choose your favorite art style.

faqItems.q: How long does it take to generate a pet portrait?
faqItems.a: Most pet portraits are generated within 30-60 seconds. Complex styles may take slightly longer. You'll receive 4 unique variations to choose from.
We offer 70+ art styles including Royal Portrait, Disney Pixar, Oil Painting, Watercolor, Anime, Pop Art, Renaissance, Van Gogh, Sketch, and many more artistic styles.
We support JPG, PNG, and WebP formats. For best results, use a clear, well-lit photo where your pet's face is clearly visible.

faqItems.q: Can I use the pet portraits commercially?
faqItems.a: Yes! All generated pet portraits are yours to use as you wish, including for personal projects, gifts, prints, and commercial purposes.
